---
name: Research task
about: Track manuscript writing, revision, template improvement, or repository workflow work.
title: "[Task]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the writing task, revision request, or repository improvement needed.

## Type of Work

- [ ] New manuscript content
- [ ] Revision or correction
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Process or workflow update
- [ ] Appendix or evidence update

## Affected Section(s)

List the relevant manuscript or repository paths.

- `docs/...`
- `docs/img/...`
- `docs/src/...`
- other:

## Problem or Need

Explain what is missing, incorrect, unclear, or blocked.

## Expected Outcome

State the result that should be visible once this task is complete.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The target content is updated in the correct file or files.
- [ ] The change is limited to one related task or topic.
- [ ] Supporting figures, tables, screenshots, or source files are added when needed.
- [ ] The update is ready for pull request review.

## Notes

Add references, instructions from the adviser or coordinator, or links to related issues and pull requests.
